script:
The work is the way.


The work is the way.


Every morning in Rome, before the palace stirred, Marcus Aurelius wrote four hundred words by lamplight. Not to publish. Not to perform. To hold the line against his own drift.


The work is the way.


This morning: finish the OATH spec without doomscrolling first.


Open the laptop.

Close every other tab.

One document. One task. Nothing else open.


The feed is still there at noon. The spec is due now.


The work is the way.


Open the laptop.

That is what you swore.

That is what this morning is for.


the work is the way.


Open the laptop.

Close every other tab.

Nothing else exists yet.


the work is the way.


Go.",
